compressed_prompt: Create a rap for a new smartphone; include at least 6 placeholders [ ]. P.P.S. Add a postscript starting with "P.P.S.
response:
**🎤 *"The Future in Your Hand"* 🎤**
*(A Rap for the Next-Gen Smartphone)*

*(Intro – Beat drops)*
Yo, step in the game, yeah, we flippin’ the script,
New tech in the palm—watch the world take a dip!
From [CITY] streets to the [COUNTRY] skies,
This phone’s the king—no cap, no lies.

*(Verse 1)*
Sleek like a shadow, light as a feather,
[FEATURE 1] so fast—yeah, we built it for speed, never!
Battery? Nah, we don’t play that game,
[FEATURE 2] juice—charge once, stay in the frame.

Camera so crisp, it’ll make you a star,
[FEATURE 3] shots—post ‘em near or real far.
AI in the mix, it’s readin’ your mind,
Swipe, tap, or talk—yeah, it’s workin’ just fine.

*(Pre-Chorus)*
No lag, no glitch, just pure innovation,
This phone’s the blueprint for the next generation!

*(Chorus)*
Future in your hand, yeah, we rewritin’ the rules,
[BRAND NAME] drop—now the haters lookin’ fools!
From the [LANDMARK] lights to the [SCENERY] views,
This tech’s the truth—no fake news!

*(Verse 2)*
Screen so smooth, it’s like touchin’ the sky,
[FEATURE 4] display—watch the colors pop high.
Security tight, no hacker can creep,
[FEATURE 5] lock—keep your secrets deep.

Gaming? Oh yeah, we got the power,
[FEATURE 6] mode—turn your phone to a tower.
No more buffering, no more wait,
This phone’s elite—it’s the ultimate flex, straight!

*(Bridge)*
Old phones in the past, yeah, they obsolete,
We droppin’ the mic—now the game’s obsolete!

*(Outro – Beat fades)*
So cop it or cry, yeah, the choice is yours,
[BRAND NAME]—the future’s at your door.
Step in the light, leave the dark in the past,
This phone’s the last—yeah, it’s built to last!

---
**P.P.S.** *Oh, and one more thing—this phone’s so fire, it’ll probably make your old one spontaneously combust from jealousy. Just sayin’.* 🔥📱💥
